raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Work reflection","name":"How has the last couple of weeks felt from your side at work?","description":"Allows Priya to share her perspective and set the context for the conversation.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Refactor success","name":"What specifically about the payments refactor are you proud of?","description":"Encourages Priya to reflect on her achievements and what made the project successful.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Post-launch energy","name":"What's contributing to your current energy levels post-launch?","description":"Explores the reasons behind Priya's current energy state and any potential factors impacting it.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Mentoring vision","name":"What would you want mentoring to look like in your schedule?","description":"Surfaces Priya's interest and vision for her involvement in mentoring activities.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Billing rewrite readiness","name":"Where do you think your skills would be most valuable in the billing rewrite?","description":"Encourages Priya to consider her future involvement and how her skills align with upcoming projects.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"What support do you need from me right now?","description":"Directly asks Priya what support she requires, ensuring alignment with her needs.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Refactor feedback","name":"How did the team's response to the refactor feel to you?","description":"Checks if the recognition received for the refactor was satisfactory or if anything felt lacking.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Prioritisation trade-offs","name":"What are you choosing to deprioritise to focus on current goals?","description":"Identifies areas Priya is consciously deprioritising, revealing her prioritisation process.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Growth opportunities","name":"What areas do you see as growth opportunities in your current role?","description":"Explores Priya's perception of growth within her role and where she sees potential for development.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy drivers","name":"What's been driving your motivation recently?","description":"Identifies factors that are currently motivating Priya, providing insight into her engagement levels.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next steps","name":"What’s the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Encourages Priya to articulate the next steps or actions she plans to take.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
